strengths: Proven A/B test design and analysis
weaknesses: Limited explicit mention of asynchronous/remote contract work
No explicit experience presenting to non-technical C-suite
Fewer examples of peer code review for analytics artifacts
improvement_bullets: Conducted rigorous peer code reviews for SQL/Python analytics notebooks, providing constructive feedback on logic, complexity, and performance to ensure high-quality, professional-grade outputs.
Presented complex data insights to non-technical executive stakeholders, distilling advanced statistical models into clear, actionable business strategies.
Delivered project-based data solutions in a remote, asynchronous environment, demonstrating the ability to independently manage project lifecycles and meet high-performance standards.
Utilized R for advanced statistical analysis and hypothesis testing, supplementing existing Python workflows to enhance the analytical depth of marketing and operational reporting.
Contracted as an independent analytical consultant for data projects, maintaining high productivity and self-directed project delivery on a flexible, outcome-oriented schedule.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Data Analyst opportunity with Mercor. I am interested in this opportunity because of Mercor's position at the intersection of elite talent and AI research, which demands a standard of analytical rigor I am eager to apply. What interests me about working for Mercor is its innovative approach to connecting top-tier professionals with cutting-edge labs, which inspires me because I thrive in high-stakes, performance-driven environments. I believe my advanced proficiency in SQL/Python analytics and my experience in distilling technical insights for non-technical leadership would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems with a focus on 'single source of truth' accuracy and automation. In fact, at Shine Masters, I replaced manual reporting with automated Python and Power BI workflows, reducing data mismatches by 40%. The result was that leadership could make strategic decisions 8 hours faster each week, a efficiency gain I am prepared to replicate for Mercor's stakeholders. Ultimately, I know that the Data Analyst role at Mercor would allow me to bring my experience in creating high-quality analytics artifacts to your review and development process. Additionally, my role as a Data Analyst at Shine Masters enabled me to develop my stakeholder communication skills. I was tasked with translating complex A/B test results into actionable marketing spend recommendations. By framing the data narratively for non-technical stakeholders, I helped guide initiatives that drove a 300% increase in revenue within targeted segments over 12 months. I’m excited by the opportunity to use my background in data quality validation and reporting to contribute to the high-quality professional output at Mercor. I know that my expertise in building robust, error-free analytics and my ability to work independently align with what it takes to succeed in this role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
